summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QuizHub multiplayer trivia game - all backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns correct status, version, and player_count
POST /api/join creates players with valid nicknames
POST /api/game/start starts game and returns question state
Frontend join screen loads with nickname input and Join Game button
Frontend nickname entry and join functionality works
Frontend lobby screen shows player list correctly
Frontend Start Game button initiates game
Frontend question screen displays with timer, options, and metadata
Frontend answer selection shows result toast (correct/wrong)
Frontend Next button advances to next question
